name: Life RP: The Rich Life 2
description:
Ever wanted to live in a mansion with a large staff? Well, that's called being rich! And now YOU can be rich! YOU can have a mansion with a large staff!

Note: This isn't an original idea. I copied the bot details and then just put my own spin on it. Y'know, clean it up and make things look nice.


So, here's the credit:
OG Creator: @kevinweird11
OG Bot: Life RP - The Rich Life

2nd Note: If you want anything added to the bot, please let me know in the comments. And if the bot does anything weird or gets you upset, don't blame me. Blame JLLM or whatever proxy you're using.
creator: GirlyGirlPinkyPink
